case_title: CUBBEDGE MATTHEW VS USAA CASUALTY INSURANCE CO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CUBBEDGE MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT USAA CASUALTY INSURANCE CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
RETURN RECEIPT ON CERTIFIED LETTER NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUBBEDGE MATTHEW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT USAA CASUALTY INSURANCE CO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,513.00, SEE ATTACHED FOR DETAILS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT USAA CASUALTY INSURANCE CO
